Title: Annoying Boss Punch
Description: Fully developed from scratch with physics-driven combat and responsive animation systems; Implemented complete monetization pipeline using AdMob mediation and Firebase (analytics, remote config, revenue tracking); Optimized for smooth performance across mobile devices;

Title: Metaclash Undead
Description: PC multiplayer Humans vs Zombies experience featuring headless dedicated server architecture; Implemented Mirror networking and advanced AI behaviors; Performed deep profiling for memory and performance optimization; Focused on scalable and stable multiplayer gameplay;

Title: Paint Olympus
Description: Third-person multiplayer Web3 game built with Photon Fusion and dedicated servers; Integrated external APIs and Ready Player Me avatars; Optimized network performance and memory usage for scalable real-time multiplayer gameplay;

Title: Donut Empire Tycoon
Description: Tycoon simulation built entirely from scratch featuring custom AI systems; Designed behaviors for employees, customers, VIP customers, and vehicle flow; Implemented environment interactions, land progression, economy balancing, and player upgrades; Strong focus on scalable AI architecture and mobile performance;

Title: Naugty Boy House Escape Game
Description: Stealth puzzle game developed from scratch; Implemented cinematic cutscenes using Timeline and Cinemachine; Built LiveOps systems including daily rewards and spin wheel; Designed multiple power-ups to improve retention and engagement;

Title: Color Sort - Multiplayer PvP
Description: Puzzle game built from scratch featuring AI opponents and real-time PvP multiplayer; Implemented full meta systems including leaderboard, shop, and VIP subscription; Designed gameplay powers and optimized for smooth mobile performance;

Title: Ecoscape
Description: Complete gameplay framework developed from scratch including custom character controller and animation pipeline; Implemented multiple interactive task systems and handcrafted levels; Added customized particle effects and prop animations;

Title: FPS Shooting Game
Description: Enhanced FPS gameplay by improving player controls and enemy AI; Built a new machine gun mode from scratch and expanded TDM gameplay; Implemented dynamic day/night lighting; Significantly reduced ANRs through deep profiling and optimization;
